top_signals.title: Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next
top_signals.summary: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s IPO bust clouds equity markets as Chaebol structure restrains listings
top_signals.summary: South Korea's IPO activity has lagged that of its regional peers as the structure of the market and governance reforms collide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Tax cut on meals and days out come into force.

top_signals.title: Bangladesh turns to $80bn ADB-backed economic corridor for growth
a16z CSX-backed Cambrian raises $6 million seed to build blockchain data oracle network
top_signals.summary: Cambrian, a startup building blockchain data infrastructure for institutions and AI agents, raised $6 million in a seed funding round.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Canada Building West’s First Grid-Scale SMR
top_signals.summary: Construction has begun on the Western world’s first grid-scale Small Modular Reactor (SMR), though small is not what comes to mind, considering that the machine will fit on two soccer fields. According to AutoNotion, a 953-tonne slab of steel and concrete was lowered into a 35-meter shaft at Ontario’s Darlington New Nuclear Project site, “ending a decade of talk” about the new nuclear technology and ushering in a period of action. The slab is the base mat of the first BWRX-300 modular plant designed by GE Vernova —…
